scripts.dev: NODE_ENV=development DEBUG=langwatch:* DEBUG_HIDE_DATE=true DEBUG_COLORS=true concurrently 'node server.js' 'npm run start:workers'
scripts.build: export DEPENDENCY_INJECTION_DIR=$(pwd)/src/injection/; export EXTRA_INCLUDE=$(pwd)/src; cp .env langwatch/langwatch/; cd langwatch/langwatch; npm run build
scripts.start: npm run prepare:production && NODE_ENV=production DEBUG=langwatch:* DEBUG_COLORS=true NEXTJS_DIST_DIR=.next node server.js
scripts.start:prepare: cp .env langwatch/langwatch/; cd langwatch/langwatch; npm install && npm run start:prepare:files && cd ../../ && npm run prisma:generate:typescript
scripts.prisma:generate:prepare: node prisma/generate-schema.js && for d in langwatch/langwatch/prisma/migrations/*; do [[ $(basename $d) != 'migration_lock.toml' ]] && mkdir -p prisma/migrations/$(basename $d) && for f in $d/*; do ln -sfn ../../../$f prisma/migrations/$(basename $d)/; done; done; echo 'ok'
scripts.prisma:generate:typescript: npm run prisma:generate:prepare && npx prisma generate && cp -R node_modules/.prisma/* langwatch/langwatch/node_modules/.prisma/
scripts.prisma:generate:migration: cd langwatch/langwatch && DATABASE_URL='postgresql://postgres@localhost:5432/?sslmode=allow&schema=langwatch_db' npm run prisma:generate:migration && cd - && npm run prisma:migrate && npm run prisma:generate:prepare && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.prepare:production: npm run prisma:generate:typescript && npm run prisma:migrate && npm run elastic:migrate
